methodsAttempted.notes: Returned mostly research, event, thesis-title and AI Act items; no direct university policy source in top results.

summary: Firecrawl search found three usable official LMU sources: IfKW student AI-use rules, the Medical Faculty GWP AI page for dissertations, and an LMU-hosted KI/ChatGPT teaching handout. Rejected results were duplicate, news/event-only, research-showcase-only, or too generic for policy claims.
